items.title: Missing values and imputation
items.description: SimpleImputer and KNNImputer plug into pipeline branches; MCAR/MAR/MNAR reasoning and imputation strategy choice are defined in the missing-values topic—this topic wires imputers in the correct order and fit scope.

items.title: Scaling and normalization
items.description: StandardScaler and MinMaxScaler belong after imputation in numeric branches; formulas, outlier sensitivity, and when scaling is required are canonical in scaling-and-normalization.

items.title: Loading data
items.description: CSV, parquet, and API loads produce the DataFrames that enter cleaning steps; parse dtypes and dates at load so pipeline keys and join columns are stable.

items.title: Data leakage
items.description: Fitting a pipeline on train+test before splitting, or refitting transformers on production batches, leaks holdout statistics—the same failure mode as global scaling; Pipeline train-only fit is the primary defense.

items.title: Groupby and joins
items.description: After relational reshaping, entity-level tables still need deduplicated keys and consistent dtypes before ColumnTransformer branches; join-safe aggregations should complete before the sklearn pipeline fit.
